name: migrate_pblock
short_description: Migrate pblocks from sites to tiles
full_help:
migrate_pblock

Description: 
Migrate pblocks from sites to tiles

Syntax: 
migrate_pblock  [-name <arg>] [-names <args>] [-to_sites] [-to_tiles] [-quiet]
                [-verbose]

Returns: 
New area constraints

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-name]      Name of the pblock to migrate
  [-names]     List of pblocks to migrate
  [-to_sites]  Migrate pblocks to sites.
  [-to_tiles]  Migrate pblocks to tiles.
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
XDC, Floorplan

arguments.description: Name of the pblock to migrate
Suspend message limits during command execution
